---
title: "Cantidad de dispositivos móviles en América - Dayana Espinoza Montalvo"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard) # always
library(ggplot2)
library(sf)      
```

<!-- links -->
```{r}
map1link = "https://github.com/despinozam733/evaluacion/raw/main/map1.rds"
map2link = "https://github.com/despinozam733/evaluacion/raw/main/map2.rds"
map3link = "https://github.com/despinozam733/evaluacion/raw/main/map3.rds"

viz1=url(map1link)

viz2=url(map2link)

viz3=url(map3link)
```

## Sidebar {.sidebar}

Evaluación individual - generación de mapas DOT DENSITY MAP, PROPORTIONAL SYMBOL MAP, CHOROPLETH MAP. 
20200862 Dayana Alejandra Espinoza Montalvo. 
2026.  

## Column {.tabset .tabset-fade}


### DOT DENSITY MAP

```{r}
readRDS(viz1)
```


### PROPORTIONAL SYMBOL MAP

```{r}
readRDS(viz2)
```

### CHOROPLETH MAP

```{r}
readRDS(viz3)
```
